title: LangGraph-Native DecisionGraph + Studio Adapter
source_docs: official LangGraph JS docs: application structure, local server, persistence

decisions.brief: DecisionGraph business flow is an exported LangGraph-native compiled graph
runDecisionGraph remains the public adapter and invokes the compiled graph
Stage1CheckpointStore is downgraded to run registry and metadata storage
CLI keeps run_id while registry maps to LangGraph thread/checkpoint ids
Graph state uses processed context and evidence refs, not raw evidence blobs
No custom evidence detail UI or large-object display in T007
For native DecisionGraph runs, thread_id equals run_id
Studio direct real-persistence is forbidden; Studio is load-only plus optional fixture invocation
runs show exposes bounded metadata and summaries, not full native graph state
langgraph.json must include dependencies ["."], graphs.decision_graph, and env "../../.env"
S1 adds config/dependencies only; S2 owns the real compiled graph export and Studio load gate

graph_entry.rule: The exported graph is a real compiled StateGraph or documented factory accepted by the LangGraph CLI, not a placeholder.

adapter_contract.rule: The adapter invokes the compiled graph with configurable.thread_id = run_id and returns the same T006 result shape.

run_registry_contract.mapping: For native DecisionGraph, thread_id equals run_id and checkpoint_ref stores the latest LangGraph checkpoint id when available.

runs_show_shape.status: queued | running | interrupted | succeeded | failed | cancelled
runs_show_shape.output: bounded summary with snapshot_id, decision_id, action, scheduled_outcome_count, paper_execution_submitted
runs_show_shape.checkpoints: empty array or metadata-only records; no full native graph state

run_registry_contract.resume_rule: resumeRun loads registry by run_id, uses thread_id = run_id, invokes the compiled graph with configurable.thread_id, and must not duplicate persisted decisions or scheduled outcomes.
run_registry_contract.idempotency_rule: Native DecisionGraph persist node supplies a deterministic decision_id derived from run_id when the caller did not provide one.
run_registry_contract.rule: Run registry stores metadata and summaries only. LangGraph checkpointer stores graph state.

studio_contract.rule: Direct Studio invocation must not write context_snapshots, model_decisions, or decision_outcomes in T007. Real domain persistence goes through workflow CLI / Stage1Runtime.

json_envelope.status: queued | running | interrupted | succeeded | failed | cancelled | null

notes: Use the installed @langchain/langgraph version already present unless package compatibility requires a lockfile update.
The official SQLite checkpointer may be wrapped by apps/trader-workflows/src/runtime/langgraphCheckpointer.ts.

acceptance.check: langgraph.json exists with dependencies ["."], only graphs.decision_graph, and env "../../.env"
DecisionGraph business flow is implemented as native StateGraph nodes
runDecisionGraph invokes the compiled graph and preserves T006 output shape
run_id remains the CLI-facing identifier and native DecisionGraph uses thread_id = run_id
Stage1CheckpointStore no longer stores full native DecisionGraph checkpoint state and runs show returns bounded metadata
Direct Studio real-persistence is not enabled in T007
Graph state contains processed context and evidence refs, not raw evidence blobs
OutcomeGraph, EvaluationGraph, and InsightExplorationGraph are not migrated in T007
No custom evidence detail UI, workflow UI, backend schema/API change, paper execution, training, or promotion is added

verification.command: Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/langgraph-native-decisiongraph/spec.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/langgraph-native-decisiongraph/decision-record.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/tasks/T007.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null
verification.expect: T007 spec, decision record, and task parse as JSON

verification.command: $cfg = Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 apps/trader-workflows/langgraph.json | ConvertFrom-Json; if (($cfg.dependencies -join ',') -ne '.') { throw 'langgraph dependencies must be ["."]' }; $names = $cfg.graphs.PSObject.Properties.Name; if (($names -join ',') -ne 'decision_graph') { throw 'langgraph graphs must contain only decision_graph' }; if ($cfg.graphs.decision_graph -ne './src/graphs/decisionGraph.ts:decisionGraph') { throw 'decision_graph export path mismatch' }; if ($cfg.env -ne '../../.env') { throw 'langgraph env must be ../../.env' }
verification.expect: langgraph.json has the exact T007 config shape
Native DecisionGraph preserves T006 decision behavior, validation, persistence, outcome scheduling, and named node flow
Tests prove runDecisionGraph invokes the compiled graph path and does not use the old hand-written class flow
Run registry preserves run_id/list/show/resume, uses thread_id = run_id for native DecisionGraph, returns bounded runs show metadata, and does not store full native graph state checkpoints
LangGraph Agent Server starts and Studio lists only decision_graph; do not perform direct Studio real-persistence in T007

verification.command: manual: with backend dev server running and repo-root .env/LLM configured, run npm run trader-cli -- decide TSLA.US --json; then npm run trader-cli -- runs show <RUN_ID> --json
verification.expect: CLI JSON envelope still exposes run_id; runs show returns thread_id equal to run_id plus bounded output summary and no full native graph state
No whitespace errors in T007 plan or implementation files

verification.command: manual: run git diff --name-only and confirm no forbidden paths; review diff content for custom workflow UI, evidence detail UI, backend schema/API changes, non-DecisionGraph migration, paper execution, training, and promotion terms
verification.expect: No forbidden paths or forbidden scope are present in the diff
